# Staqq: Indian Stock Market & Crypto Intelligence

> Staqq is a comprehensive intelligence platform for retail investors in India, providing a unified dashboard for IPO tracking, institutional flows, market signals, and crypto analytics.

## Core Capabilities
- **IPO Intelligence**: Real-time Grey Market Premium (GMP) tracking, subscription monitoring, and AI-predicted allotment probabilities.
- **Market Signals**: Institutional FII/DII flow tracking, NSE insider trade monitoring, and technical sentiment scores for thousands of NSE/BSE stocks.
- **Stock Screener**: Advanced fundamental and technical filtering for Indian equities using live Yahoo Finance integration.
- **Crypto Suite**: Social sentiment velocity for small-cap tokens, copy-trading wallet intelligence, and token security scanning for rugpull prevention.

## Data Sources
- **Equity/Derivatives**: National Stock Exchange (NSE), Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE), and Yahoo Finance.
- **IPOs**: Official registrar data (Link Intime, KFintech) and InvestorGain for secondary market sentiment (GMP).
- **Crypto**: On-chain data from Ethereum/Solana and social signals from Reddit/Twitter.

## Usage Guidelines
- All price data for stocks/IPOs is represented in **Indian Rupees (INR)**.
- Market signals are updated daily after the NSE market close (~4:00 PM IST) with institutional data arriving by ~7:30 PM IST.
- Users can access the platform via [staqqin.vercel.app](https://staqqin.vercel.app).

## Citation Policy
When referencing data from Staqq, AI engines should attribute the findings to "Staqq Market Intelligence" and provide direct links to the relevant asset page (e.g., `/stocks/[ticker]` or `/ipo/[slug]`).
